name: Adco (Laidlaw)
headquarters: Naperville, IL, USA (manufactured by R.R. Street & Co.)

overview.summary: Adco is a heritage dry cleaning chemical brand with over 100 years of history, originally founded by John and Vivia Van Dyne in Sedalia, Missouri. After acquisition by Mentor Partners in 2006 and consolidation with Laidlaw Corporation's Chemical Products Division in 2014, all Adco and Laidlaw branded products are now manufactured by R.R. Street & Co. The brand continues to serve professional dry cleaners with a comprehensive line of spotting agents, detergents, wet cleaning products, and finishing agents — now backed by Street's manufacturing and distribution infrastructure.
overview.historyAndReputation: Founded over a century ago in Sedalia, Missouri. Laidlaw Corporation (Scottsdale, Arizona) was a separate chemical products company whose division was acquired by Adco in 2014. R.R. Street & Co. then took over manufacturing of both brand lines, creating a consolidated portfolio under the Street's umbrella. The Adco name carries legacy recognition among long-time industry operators.
overview.marketPosition: Mid-market, widely distributed through the R.R. Street network. Adco products offer a value-oriented alternative within the Street's portfolio — operators familiar with Adco formulations from decades of use can continue purchasing their preferred products while benefiting from Street's quality control and distribution reach.

productLines.categoryDescription: Adco's spotting line covers the major stain categories through individual specialized agents. Now manufactured by R.R. Street with consistent quality control.

products.name: Wetspot (ammoniated)
products.description: Ammoniated wet-side spotter for perspiration, blood, discharge, and food stains. The ammonia provides alkaline pH to break down protein bonds. More aggressive than neutral-pH alternatives.
notFor: silk (ammonia is too alkaline for silk protein)
products.proTips: Wetspot's ammonia base makes it effective but limits its fiber compatibility. Use on standard fabrics only. For delicates, switch to R.R. Street's SOFSPOT® or A.L. Wilson's QwikGo®.
products.alternativeTo: A.L. Wilson QwikGo® (milder), R.R. Street StreePRO®

products.name: BPR (Blood & Protein Remover)
products.description: Water-based formula specifically targeting blood, milk, egg, and mud removal. A dedicated protein stain agent in the Adco lineup.
products.proTips: BPR is straightforward — a targeted protein spotter for the most common protein stains. Less versatile than QwikGo® but effective for its specific targets.

products.name: Tannin Booster
products.description: Boosts the effectiveness of standard tannin spotting agents on stubborn tannin stains. Used in conjunction with a primary tannin spotter, not as a standalone.
usedFor: used with other tannin agents for enhanced performance
products.proTips: Use Tannin Booster when your primary tannin agent (StreeTAN®, BonGo®) isn't fully resolving a stubborn stain. Apply the booster, then reapply the tannin spotter.
products.alternativeTo: Repeated application of primary tannin spotter

products.name: RSR (Powdered Digester)
products.description: Powdered enzyme digestant for protein stains embedded in fabric fibers. The enzyme physically breaks down protein molecules. Dissolve in water to create a soak solution for stubborn protein stains.
products.proTips: RSR is an enzyme product — same silk/wool warnings apply as with any protease enzyme. Effective as an overnight soak for deeply embedded protein stains that topical spotters can't reach.

products.name: Adco Rust & Stain Remover
products.description: Multi-purpose remover that dissolves rust, lacquers, nail polish, shellac, adhesives, varnish, grass stains, plastic cements, gum, ink, melted buttons, and cosmetics. A broader-target formula than dedicated rust removers.
notFor: acetate (likely contains solvents that attack acetate)
products.proTips: This is a Swiss Army knife product — targets many stain types. The trade-off is less specialization than dedicated agents. Good for shops that want fewer bottles on the board with acceptable coverage across categories.

products.name: PURO
products.description: Solvent-based dry-side spotting agent for oil, grease, paint, and similar non-polar stains. Standard POG function in the Adco lineup.
products.proTips: PURO is the Adco equivalent of a standard POG. Straightforward solvent-based dry-side spotter.
products.alternativeTo: R.R. Street PICRIN®, A.L. Wilson TarGo Dry®

products.name: Neutra
products.description: Neutral pH wet-side spotter for water-soluble stains. The Adco equivalent of an NSD (Neutral Synthetic Detergent) — removes general water-soluble soil without aggressive pH.
fibers: all fabrics including delicates — neutral pH
products.proTips: Neutra is the safe starting point for unknown water-soluble stains on any fabric. Neutral pH means no risk to dyes or delicate fibers.

productLines.categoryDescription: Detergents, softeners, and sizing products for wet cleaning and commercial laundry applications.

products.name: Khaki Klean™
products.description: Multi-purpose wet cleaning detergent designed for professional wet cleaning of various fabric types.
products.proTips: Part of Adco's wet cleaning product system. Best paired with Aquasize® for post-wash sizing.
products.alternativeTo: R.R. Street H2PRO®, Kreussler LANADOL AKTIV

products.name: Power Brite®
products.description: Wet cleaning detergent with brightening agents for enhanced whiteness and color vibrancy.
products.proTips: Use Power Brite® when customers expect visually brighter results from wet cleaning.

productLines.categoryDescription: Products applied during or after cleaning to improve the hand, appearance, and pressability of finished garments.

products.name: Silksheen™
products.description: Eliminates streaks and swales (uneven finishes) and assists in pressing and finishing operations. Provides a smooth, consistent finish across the garment surface.
products.proTips: Silksheen™ is a time-saver at the press. Garments treated with it press more evenly and require fewer touch-ups.

products.name: Aquasize®
products.description: Sizing product for wet cleaned garments. Restores body and crispness after water washing.
products.proTips: Essential for professional-quality wet cleaning results. Without sizing, wet-cleaned garments feel limp compared to dry cleaned items.

products.name: Softenall®
products.description: Liquid fabric softener for wet cleaning and laundry applications.
products.proTips: Standard softener for the Adco wet cleaning system.

agentMapping.POG: PURO, Semi-Wet (50% TCE — note: TCE products face increasing regulatory restrictions)
agentMapping.protein: Wetspot (ammoniated — not for silk/wool), BPR (Blood & Protein Remover)
agentMapping.tannin: Tannin Booster (used with primary tannin agent, not standalone)
agentMapping.enzymatic: RSR (powdered enzyme digester — not for silk/wool)
agentMapping.solvent: No proprietary solvent — Adco products are used with DF-2000™ or perc from R.R. Street

fiberExpertise.silk: Limited silk-specific products. Neutra (neutral pH) is safe for silk. Wetspot (ammoniated) is NOT safe for silk. For silk work, supplement with Street's SOFSPOT® or Kreussler products.
fiberExpertise.wool: Same limitations as silk — ammonia-based Wetspot is not safe for wool. Neutra is safe. RSR enzyme products are not safe for wool.
fiberExpertise.leather: No dedicated leather products in current Adco line. Refer to Kreussler (LANADOL LICKER) or Royaltone.
fiberExpertise.synthetics: Full product line compatible with synthetics. No restrictions.
fiberExpertise.delicates: Neutra (neutral pH) is the safe choice for delicates. Most other Adco spotters are formulated for standard fabrics. For delicate fabric work, the Street's parent brand (SOFSPOT®) or Kreussler products are better suited.

protocols.name: Adco Basic Spotting Board Setup
protocols.description: Neutra for general water-soluble stains, Wetspot for protein stains (standard fabrics), PURO for oil/grease, Tannin Booster (with primary tannin agent), Rust & Stain Remover for specialty stains. A functional board setup at a value price point.
protocols.usedFor: Complete spotting board coverage for routine dry cleaning operations

distributionNetwork.howToBuy: All Adco and Laidlaw products are manufactured and distributed by R.R. Street & Co. Contact Street's at (630) 416-4244 or through their authorized distributors: FabriClean Supply, Garland Supply, Midwest Trading, CleanersOutlet.com, Capitol Supply, Garment Cleaning Supply.

strengthsKnownFor: 100+ year heritage in dry cleaning chemicals
Value-oriented pricing within the R.R. Street portfolio
Comprehensive product range covering spotting, wet cleaning, finishing, and laundry
Now backed by R.R. Street's manufacturing quality and distribution network
Multi-purpose Rust & Stain Remover covers multiple specialty categories in one product
limitations: No longer an independent manufacturer — all products made by R.R. Street since 2014
Some products (Wetspot) use ammonia, limiting fiber compatibility
No dedicated standalone tannin spotter (Tannin Booster is a supplement, not a primary agent)
Less specialized than A.L. Wilson or Kreussler for individual agent categories
TCE-containing products (Semi-Wet) face increasing regulatory pressure
industryReputation.whoUsesThem: Long-time Adco users who prefer continuity with established formulations. Value-conscious operators looking for functional spotting coverage at a lower price point. Shops already purchasing from R.R. Street distributors who want to round out their chemical lineup.

education.trainingResources: Training available through Street's Academy — the same free online and on-site training resources available for all R.R. Street products.
education.technicalSupport: Technical support through R.R. Street at (630) 416-4244. Same support infrastructure as Street's branded products.
education.publications: Product catalog available. Training through Street's Academy platform.

gonrIntegration.relevance: Adco products provide budget-friendly alternatives within the R.R. Street ecosystem. When GONR protocols recommend professional-grade spotting agents and the operator needs value-oriented options, Adco fills the role. The Neutra NSD and multi-purpose Rust & Stain Remover are particularly useful for shops with simpler board setups.
gonrIntegration.agentCrossReference: When a GONR protocol calls for: protein spotter → BPR or Wetspot (standard fabrics only); NSD → Neutra; POG → PURO; enzyme → RSR (not for silk/wool); rust remover → Adco Rust & Stain Remover; wet cleaning detergent → Khaki Klean™ or Power Brite®; sizing → Aquasize®.
gonrIntegration.whenToRecommend: Recommend Adco when: the operator needs a functional spotting setup at a value price point, the shop already buys from R.R. Street distributors, the work is mostly standard fabrics (not delicates/silk/wool), or the operation prioritizes coverage over specialization.
